security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https: wss: http: ws:; frame-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none';

bundle.shortDescription: Secure desktop-first messenger with resilient transport fallback.
bundle.longDescription: Secure Messenger is a desktop-first secure messaging client with device trust, encrypted envelopes, and resilient transport fallback for unstable networks.
